headline: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Stock After Recent Pullback Is The Current Price Attractive?
summary: If you have been wondering whether Lockheed Martin stock still offers good value at around US$510.95, the underlying numbers give you a structured way to test that question instead of relying on headlines or hype. The share price is close to US$510.95 after a period where the stock declined 5.4% over the last week and 2.3% over the past month, while still showing a 2.8% gain year to date and 11.5% over the last year. Those mixed returns sit against a steady drip of news coverage around...
